ques: Find the lowest-priced one-way flight from Cairo to Montreal on July 21, 2026, including the total travel time and number of stops.
answer: The lowest-priced one-way Cairo→Montreal flight on July 21, 2026 is €422 on Royal Jordanian, with 1 stop (4 hr 1 min layover in Amman) and a total travel time of 16 hr 30 min.
